{
  "claims": [
    "AB 1327 aims to prevent cuts to Medi-Cal lab rates that could negatively affect laboratory services in California.",
    "By removing the cap on Medi-Cal lab rates, California labs can avoid federally triggered cuts.",

    "AB 1327 will help maintain access to important clinical laboratory tests for Medi-Cal patients.",
    "The bill will facilitate an increase in COVID-19 testing and expand laboratory infrastructure in anticipation of the flu season.",
